Title:
Title-Source: body_internal|generated
No-Joke-Found: false

A country boy was trying to impress his country girlfriend, so he took her to the big city one night for a very fancy meal.  She was very impressed with the restaurant he picked, and told him so.  They were seated, and the waiter came up to the table to ask if they would like a cocktail.  The girl said she didn't care for a cocktail,    but the boy, trying to impress her further,  said, "yes, I will have shrimp"
